title: MarlinBasePrompt
description: Base schema for Marlin structured prompt representation (V1)

goal.description: The primary objective or purpose of the prompt

action.description: The verb or operation to perform

inputs.description: Parameters, arguments, or data the action operates on

domain.description: The context or subject area of the prompt

constraints.description: Rules, limits, or requirements that bound the action

examples.description: Sample inputs, outputs, or references provided for guidance
